site.name: Octopus
site.description: Build your high-security private digital employee team. Based on the localization environment, protect data sovereignty and empower individual and enterprise knowledge brains.

home.title: Your Private AI Digital Employee Team
home.subtitle: Unite the power of AI while protecting data sovereignty. Deploy exclusive digital employee teams and knowledge brains in your localization environment or private cloud.

consulting.title: Ready to bring agents into real work?
consulting.body: We help teams plan deployment, data boundaries, governance, and workflow integration before production rollout.

private.title: Private Deployment
private.desc: Data never leaves your domain, giving you complete control over your AI assets. Supports offline operation and intranet deployment.

localization.title: Full localization Stack
localization.desc: Deeply adapted to domestic mainstream localization CPUs, operating systems, and database environments.

team.title: Digital Employee Team
team.desc: Not just a single agent, but a collaborative digital employee team capable of parallel processing complex tasks.

pet.title: Exclusive Private Pet
pet.desc: Warm AI interaction with exclusive companionship and personalized emotional bonding.

knowledge.title: Enterprise Knowledge Brain
knowledge.desc: Accumulate private organizational knowledge for efficient semantic search and automated Q&A.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.desc: Enterprise-grade RBAC, sensitive data masking, and full-link audit traceability.

product.title: Digital Employee Stack
product.body: Octopus brings models, tools, memory, permissions, and governance into one desktop workbench so agents move beyond demos and become assignable, collaborative, auditable digital employees for real enterprise work.

mcp.title: Unified Tool Protocol
mcp.desc: Connect internal systems, databases, and APIs through MCP so every digital employee has a standard, extensible tool stack.

sandbox.title: Secure Execution And Built-ins
sandbox.desc: Agents do more than answer questions. Built-in tools and isolated execution let them act within clear authorization boundaries.

telemetry.title: Visible Process, Traceable Results
telemetry.desc: From conversation context to execution output, critical steps, calls, and artifacts stay observable, replayable, and reviewable.

plugin.title: Skills And Plugin Extensions
plugin.desc: Package domain workflows, team SOPs, and custom capabilities into reusable skills and plugins that expand each digital employee role.

desktop.title: Unified Desktop Workbench
desktop.desc: Bring conversations, knowledge, resources, digital employees, and governance into one desktop surface for continuous collaboration.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Governance And RBAC
enterprise.desc: Apply roles, permissions, auditability, and security controls at the system layer so teams can operate confidently in real environments.

scenarios.title: Wide Range of Scenarios
scenarios.body: Covering individual, team, and enterprise lifecycles, empowering every business stage.

about.title: About Octopus
about.body: We are dedicated to providing secure, controllable, and intelligent AI infrastructure for every organization through open source and private technologies.

bookDemo.title: Enterprise Consultation
bookDemo.body: Share your organization and current requirements. We will respond with consultation tailored to deployment options, governance expectations, and business workflows.
bookDemo.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. Our team will contact you within two business days to confirm your scenario, deployment approach, and governance requirements.

form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your scenario, deployment expectations, integrations, and governance requirements...

download.title: Download Octopus Desktop
download.subtitle: Choose the currently available build for your platform and review what changed in each version directly on this page.

hints.macos: Apple Silicon first, Intel in earlier builds

download.requirements: Your first install may require the platform's normal security confirmation or permission flow.
download.failed: Version data is temporarily unavailable. Try again later or open the full version list directly.
download.availableBody: Only the stable and preview builds that are currently available for download are shown here.
download.historyBody: Downloadable builds and update details for the 8 most recent releases.
download.notesEmpty: No additional update details were published for this version.

experience.title: One desktop workbench for agent collaboration
experience.desc: The desktop client keeps conversations, tools, knowledge, and governance in one operational surface so digital employees can keep working across real business flows instead of isolated demos.
